Why Trade with Us

Enjoy seamless trading experience and excellent customer support.

Help when you need it

The ELITE-BIT support team is available via live chat 24/7 – even on weekends. You can also find answers at our Help Center (FAQ)

Customer-First Trading Experience

ELITE-BIT makes it easy for anyone to start trading, understand risk, and make better trading decisions. Our tools and platforms have clear and simple instructions and are intuitively easy to navigate.

Risk Awareness And Management

Online trading is exciting but involves risks and can lead to an addiction. At ELITE-BIT, we look out for our customer’s best interests and encourage them to practice secure and responsible trading. If you are new to this, you can also practice trading with unlimited virtual funds before you risk your money.

Client Money Protection

ELITE-BIT does not use your money for its business interests and you are allowed to withdraw your money at any time. All your money is segregated and held in secure financial institutions.

Regulated

ELITE-BIT is regulated by several entities including the Malta Financial Services Authority (MFSA), the Labuan Financial Services Authority (Labuan FSA), the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission (VFSC), and the British Virgin Islands Financial Services Commission.

Proven Track Record

ELITE-BIT has a history that dates back to 1999 when we laid the groundwork for the world’s first fixed-odds trading service. Since then, we have grown from strength to strength, garnering the trust of traders around the world.

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to common questions about trading on ELITE BIT - Your go-to guide for smooth trading experience

How long does it take to process my withdrawal?

We offer instant withdrawal services to all our clients. To ensure that they are able to access their money as fast as they want.

Who are we?

ELITE-BIT is a trading company devoted to making money from cryptocurrencies' volatility and offers our clients excellent returns.

Can I Do A Direct Deposit To My ELITE-BIT Account Balance?

Yes! To make a deposit from your ELITE-BIT account balance. Simply login into your member account and click on Make Deposit and select the Deposit from Account Balance.

How Can I Invest With ELITE-BIT?

To trade with us, you must first become a member of ELITE-BIT. Once you are signed up, you can make your first deposit. All deposits must be made through the Members Area. You can log in using the member username and password you receive when signup.

Is ELITE-BIT signals generated by live traders or robots?

We have free signals available daily which are generated for our traders using specific trading algorithms.

How Can I Withdraw Funds?

Login to your account using your username and password and check the Withdraw section.

Is ELITE BIT supervised by any governmental/regulatory authority?

Our company is authorized and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority under license number 705428.
